description: You are a web developer at a SaaS startup. Migrate the team's 'Book Catalog' REST API located at /home/ga/workspace/bookshelf-api/ from JavaScript to TypeScript. The migration requires creating a tsconfig.json at the project root with strict mode and esModuleInterop enabled, and renaming all 11 .js files in src/ to .ts. You must define explicit TypeScript interfaces for Book and User, and add proper type annotations to all Express middleware and route handlers. Update package.json to include necessary TypeScript devDependencies and a "build": "tsc" script. Ensure the project compiles with zero errors using npx tsc --noEmit. Do not use the 'any' type more than twice across the entire codebase and do not remove core business logic.
